tag: <TextInput placeholder="Enter details" value={loginInput} onChangeText={setLoginInput} className="text-gray-800 font-bold py-5" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />

<TextInput placeholder="Enter password" secureTextEntry={!showPassword} value={password} onChangeText={setPassword} className="flex-1 text-gray-800 font-bold py-5" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter username" value={username} onChangeText={setUsername} className="text-gray-800 font-bold py-4" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter email" value={email} onChangeText={setEmail} keyboardType="email-address" className="text-gray-800 font-bold py-4" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter phone number" value={phone} onChangeText={setPhone} keyboardType="phone-pad" className="text-gray-800 font-bold py-4" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />

<TextInput placeholder="Enter password" secureTextEntry={!showPassword} value={password} onChangeText={setPassword} className="flex-1 text-gray-800 font-bold py-4" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />

<TextInput placeholder="Confirm password" secureTextEntry={!showConfirmPassword} value={confirmPassword} onChangeText={setConfirmPassword} className="flex-1 text-gray-800 font-bold py-4" placeholderTextColor="#7a8c5f" />
<TextInput placeholder="Search expenses..." value={searchQuery} onChangeText={setSearchQuery} className="flex-1 text-gray-800 font-bold py-3" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />
<TextInput placeholder="0" keyboardType="numeric" value={amount} editable={!editingId} onChangeText={setAmount} className="flex-1 text-2xl font-black text-gray-800 py-5" />

<TextInput placeholder="Or enter custom category..." value={category} onChangeText={setCategory} className="bg-gray-50 rounded-[24px] px-6 py-5 border border-gray-100 font-black text-gray-800" />

<TextInput placeholder="What was this for?" value={notes} onChangeText={setNotes} multiline className="bg-gray-50 rounded-[24px] px-6 py-5 mb-5 border border-gray-100 font-bold text-gray-700 min-h-[120px]" textAlignVertical="top" />
<TextInput placeholder="Store name or city" value={location} onChangeText={setLocation} className="flex-1 font-black text-gray-800 py-5" />
<TextInput placeholder="Search by work name or amount..." value={searchQuery} onChangeText={setSearchQuery} className="flex-1 ml-2 text-gray-800" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter work name" value={workName} onChangeText={setWorkName} className="w-full bg-[#dfe7c7] rounded-lg px-3 py-4 mb-4" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter amount" keyboardType="numeric" value={amount} onChangeText={setAmount} className="w-full bg-[#dfe7c7] rounded-lg px-3 py-4 mb-4" />
<TextInput value={name} onChangeText={setName} editable={isEditing} placeholder="Enter full name" className="flex-1 p-4 font-semibold text-gray-800" />
<TextInput value={email} editable={false} placeholder="Email" className="flex-1 p-4 font-semibold text-gray-400" />
<TextInput value={phone} onChangeText={setPhone} editable={isEditing} placeholder="Enter phone number" keyboardType="phone-pad" className="flex-1 p-4 font-semibold text-gray-800" />
<TextInput placeholder="Search transfers..." value={searchQuery} onChangeText={setSearchQuery} className="flex-1 ml-2 text-gray-800" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter transfer name" value={name} onChangeText={setName} className="w-full bg-[#dfe7c7] rounded-lg px-3 py-4 mb-4" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter amount" keyboardType="numeric" value={amount} onChangeText={setAmount} className="w-full bg-[#dfe7c7] rounded-lg px-3 py-4 mb-4" />

<TextInput placeholder="Search diary entries..." value={searchQuery} onChangeText={setSearchQuery} style={{ flex: 1, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "600", color: "#1f2937", paddingVertical: 0 }} placeholderTextColor="#b0b8c1" />

<TextInput placeholder="A beautiful day..." value={title} onChangeText={setTitle} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 mb-5 text-base font-bold text-gray-800" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />

<TextInput placeholder="What's on your mind?" value={description} onChangeText={setDescription} multiline textAlignVertical="top" className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 mb-5 text-base text-gray-800 min-h-[160px] font-medium" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />

<TextInput placeholder="Search by category or name..." value={searchQuery} onChangeText={setSearchQuery} style={{ flex: 1, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "600", color: "#1f2937", paddingVertical: 0 }} placeholderTextColor="#b0b8c1" />
<TextInput placeholder="0" keyboardType="numeric" value={amount} editable={!editingId} onChangeText={setAmount} className="flex-1 text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 py-4" />
<TextInput placeholder="Or type custom category..." value={category} onChangeText={setCategory} className="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 border border-gray-100 font-bold text-gray-800" />

<TextInput placeholder="Add optional notes..." value={notes} onChangeText={setNotes} multiline className="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 mb-4 border border-gray-100 font-medium text-gray-700 min-h-[100px]" textAlignVertical="top" />
<TextInput placeholder="Enter location" value={location} onChangeText={setLocation} className="flex-1 font-bold text-gray-800 py-4" />
<TextInput className="flex-1 text-3xl font-black text-gray-800 py-4" keyboardType="numeric" placeholder="0.00" value={amount} onChangeText={setAmount} autoFocus />

<TextInput placeholder="Search moments, places..." placeholderTextColor="#b0b8c1" style={{ flex: 1, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "600", color: "#1f2937", paddingVertical: 0 }} value={searchQuery} onChangeText={setSearchQuery} />

<TextInput placeholder="A beautiful sunset..." value={title} onChangeText={setTitle} style={{ backgroundColor: "#f8fafc", borderWidth: 1.5, borderColor: "#f0f0f0", borderRadius: 18, paddingHorizontal: 18, paddingVertical: 16, fontSize: 15, fontWeight: "700", color: "#111827", marginBottom: 14 }} placeholderTextColor="#cbd5e1" />

<TextInput placeholder="Location" value={place} onChangeText={setPlace} style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f8fafc", borderWidth: 1.5, borderColor: "#f0f0f0", borderRadius: 18, paddingHorizontal: 14, paddingVertical: 16, fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "700", color: "#111827" }} placeholderTextColor="#cbd5e1" />
<TextInput placeholder="E.g. Birthday Celebration" value={title} onChangeText={setTitle} className="text-gray-800 font-black py-4" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />

<TextInput placeholder="Add details..." value={description} onChangeText={setDescription} multiline numberOfLines={3} className="text-gray-800 font-medium text-sm" textAlignVertical="top" placeholderTextColor="#9ca3af" />
